name: muscle
description: MUSCLE plugin bundle for Codex with self-learning review workflows, shared commands, skills, lifecycle hooks, command evidence, savings, discovery, filters, context packs, diagnostics, and project-local review state.

interface.shortDescription: Self-learning review, project memory, evidence, and diagnostics
interface.longDescription: MUSCLE adds self-learning code review, pressure review, rescue investigation support, project-local review memory, doctor diagnostics, lifecycle hooks, command evidence, savings reports, discovery reports, trust-gated filters, model routing, reusable context packs, and generated active-review snapshots while keeping project memory authoritative.
defaultPrompt: Use MUSCLE when you need a project-local review baseline, self-learning code review, lifecycle diagnostics, evidence-backed savings/discovery reports, trust-gated filters, model routing, reusable context packs, or a generated active-review snapshot.
